title: Where JP version of Komm Susser Todd played

wikitext:
[]: Where JP version of Komm Susser Todd played?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sun Dec 12, 2021 3:09 pm Hello, i have a quastion, where original Hideaki Anno version of Komm Susser Todd has played?

[]: Re: Where JP version of Komm Susser Todd played?             Quote Post by Erufailon4 » Mon Dec 13, 2021 9:58 am Nowhere, as far as I know. The only reason we even know of its existence is the... S2 Works booklet, if I remember correctly? And Anno's original lyrics don't fit the melody so they'd have to be rewritten anyway. (While there is a Japanese version of KST, "Come sweet death second impact" sung by Megumi Hayashibara, its lyrics are different.)

[]: Re: Where JP version of Komm Susser Todd played?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Tue Dec 14, 2021 1:47 pm Ok, thanks...

Article: Where JP version of Komm Susser Todd played
[]: Where JP version of Komm Susser Todd played?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sun Dec 12, 2021 3:09 pm Hello, i have a quastion, where original Hideaki Anno version of Komm Susser Todd has played?

[]: Re: Where JP version of Komm Susser Todd played?             Quote Post by Erufailon4 » Mon Dec 13, 2021 9:58 am Nowhere, as far as I know. The only reason we even know of its existence is the... S2 Works booklet, if I remember correctly? And Anno's original lyrics don't fit the melody so they'd have to be rewritten anyway. (While there is a Japanese version of KST, "Come sweet death second impact" sung by Megumi Hayashibara, its lyrics are different.)

[]: Re: Where JP version of Komm Susser Todd played?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Tue Dec 14, 2021 1:47 pm Ok, thanks...
